case_title: RIVERA, JESUS vs. URBINA, JOSE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT URBINA, JOSE URBINA, VINCENTA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT URBINA, JOSE URBINA, VICENTA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, JESUS URBINA, JOSE URBINA, VICENTA
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS URBINA, JOSE MRS. TO BE URBINA, VINCENTA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, JESUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URBINA, JOSE URBINA, VINCENTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3010 - 25TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES... STIPULATED.................. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH........ NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
